_comment: Baseline throughput thresholds keyed by TOPOLOGY_LABEL only. analyze.py uses these for regression gating. null values are skipped (SKIP, not FAIL) — seed them with: python3 scripts/perf/analyze/analyze.py --update-baseline --out <run-dir> --baseline scripts/perf/benchmarks/baseline.json

single-node.source: scripts/perf/runbooks/findings-summary.md — single-node EC:1 two local disks (Apr 2026)
